name: 沈词

appearance.face: 如玉俊朗面庞，冷峻五官
appearance.distinguishing_features: 冰湖般冷冽黑眸（含笑时琥珀光泽）与讥诮薄唇

costume.typical_outfit: 深色文人袍服，冠带整齐

visual_reference: handsome ancient Chinese scholar-official in dark hanfu, jade-like fair face, cold sharp amber-black eyes, tall slender build, long black hair tied with official guan, aloof aristocratic expression with hidden pain, realistic 8k
personality: 清冷端方、尖锐讥诮、深情隐忍、占有欲极强
desire: 护住义妹、挽回妻子与女儿、弥补前世亏欠
flaw: 固执不信人、前世冷待妻子、暧昧不清导致误会
arc: 从算计冷漠到后悔痴缠，拒绝被原谅
scene_presence: 从提亲到江南深夜纠缠，全剧第二主视角
